reasoning: The document exhibits significant visual and structural failures, specifically the omission of six out of seven informational tiles in a key grid layout and the replacement of meaningful categorical icons with solid green blocks. In the HTML output, this section is reduced to a single-item layout, omitting six of the seven tiles and losing the original grid-based visual organization. This significantly changes the visual flow and intended presentation of that section.
